form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 10 m by Western Action (1:57.90) in 3yo+ NR up to 42 on April 7 at $11. Before that, 4th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 m by Warrawee Flyer (1:57.60) in 3yo+ NR up to 42 on March 31 at $4.60. Well drawn and expected to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run at a vital stage in the straight.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 2200m after showing early pace at Marburg, beaten a nose by Shadys Delight (2:48.00) in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on April 5 at $5.50. Has definite claims.

form.formComment: Last start by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Marburg (2:48.00) beating Vodka En Ice in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on April 5 at $4.20. Winning claims on best performances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Marburg (2:48.00) beating Vodka En Ice in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on April 5 at $4.20. Winning claims on best performances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted inwards and contacted a marker peg when rounding the final turn.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr5) over 2200m at Marburg beaten 2 m by Shadys Delight (2:48.00) in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on April 5 at $3. With even luck is a winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced a three wide move around the 700m.
Held up and checked when trailing the weakening Estival leaving the 400m.
Shifted in and contacted a marker at approximately 450m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 10th (Fr2) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 55 m by Splashndash (1:57.50) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on March 30 at $26. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 1850m at Marburg, well beaten by Studleigh Anne (2:13.80) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on March 23 at $51. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward from the start to lead throughout.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) overraced, at this track (2:33.90) beating Mister Delwin in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on March 26 at $3. Hard to leave out on current form. Another strong performance expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) overraced, at this track (2:33.90) beating Mister Delwin in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on March 26 at $3. Hard to leave out on current form. Another strong performance expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted I and contacted a marker peg in the back straight in the final lap.
Utilized the sprint lane in the run to the finish.
Commenced a three wide run without cover leaving the 700m point of the event.
